message:
feat(lab): add conditional debug logging for task execution tracing

Add a guarded println that traces task execution (task ID, step number,
worker hint) during the first 100 scheduler steps. This gives visibility
into the early scheduling sequence without flooding logs during
long-running workloads—useful for diagnosing determinism and worker
affinity issues in the SporkAppHarness reproducibility path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
